response.step_by_step_log: Identified 'Roboco-san Birthday Live 2025' from the intro screen text. The animation segment has no vocals. The live performance segment displays "withØ" and "K's" as the song title and credit, respectively. Performer is identified as Roboco-san. Japanese language confirmed. Search for lyrics of "withØ" by K's did not return full lyrics, so they are set to null.
response.global_summary: The video begins with an intro screen for "Roboco-san Birthday Live 2025," followed by a short animation, and concludes with a live concert performance of the song "withØ" by Roboco-san.

scenes.description: Live performance of 'withØ' by Roboco-san. Song title and credits are shown on-screen.
